headline: Zoetis expands Human-Animal Bond Certification scholarship to include veterinary technician students
summary: NAVC and HABRI are proud to announce that Zoetis, a leading animal health company, has pledged its continued support for veterinary students across the United States by offering freeHuman-Animal Bond Certification throughout 2026. New this year, the scholarship is now available to veterinary technician students, who play a vital role on the care team, often serving as the primary point of care for clients and their pets.
